prose: Fukui reactivity analysis on phenol at B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard', PySCF DFT backend), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied phenol.xyz, used as-is (single-point; no re-optimization). Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). Cation: charge +1, mult 2; Anion: charge −1, mult 2. Integrity: status ok, trustworthy true; f+ and f− each sum to 1.0000 (charge-conservation checks passed). No warnings reported. Headline value: maximum f+ (most electrophilic site) = 2.1028319 at atom 3 (C). Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f− = 0.16201477. Results are chemically consistent with phenol's ortho/para-directing OH group activating ring carbons toward electrophilic aromatic substitution.
